hero.name: Nagendra Vallepu
hero.desc: Microsoft-Certified Data Analyst at TCS with 3+ years of experience in Power BI, SQL, and Advanced Excel. I specialize in transforming raw data into actionable insights that support strategic growth and process improvement.

about.title: Passionate About Data-Driven Insights
about.desc1: Results-driven Power BI Developer and Data Analyst with 3+ years of expertise transforming complex data into strategic business insights. Specialized in developing enterprise-grade dashboards, optimizing SQL queries, and delivering automated analytical solutions.
about.desc2: My journey in data analytics began with a passion for problem-solving and a knack for uncovering trends hidden in datasets. I partner with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical specifications and actionable insights.

services.title: Data Analysis
services.desc: Unlock trends & patterns using advanced querying and modelling to extract actionable business insights.

services.title: Power BI Development
services.desc: Design and develop dynamic Power BI dashboards for CXOs, Operations & Finance teams.

services.title: Business Analytics
services.desc: Translate complex business questions into data-backed answers that drive strategic decisions.

services.title: SQL & DAX Mastery
services.desc: Create optimized queries and calculated fields for maximum performance and accuracy.

services.title: KPI & Metric Reporting
services.desc: Help stakeholders track what matters in real-time with clear and compelling visualizations.

services.title: Financial & Risk Analysis
services.desc: Analyze financial and risk trends for banking and fin-tech clients with precision.

experience.desc: Built and deployed interactive Power BI dashboards and real-time Splunk monitoring systems to enhance operational efficiency and facilitate data-driven decision-making.
Analyzed large datasets using SQL and Excel to extract actionable insights, enabling strategic decision-making for cross-functional business teams.
Contributed to the design and development of Autonomous VTOL Aircraft. Applied machine learning techniques using Python and R.

projects.title: OTT Merger Analysis
projects.desc: Comprehensive OTT merger analysis between LioCinema and Jotstar covering subscriber behavior, content dynamics, and platform health.

projects.title: India's EV Market Analysis
projects.desc: Comprehensive analysis of key market metrics, regional insights, manufacturer performance, seasonal trends, and future projections.

projects.title: Business Insights 360
projects.desc: Analytics solution across Finance, Sales, Marketing, and Supply Chain with optimized DAX queries and dynamic visualizations.

projects.title: Finance & Supply Chain Analytics
projects.desc: MySQL-based analysis of sales performance, market dynamics, customer behavior, and supply chain forecasting.

projects.title: HR Analytics Dashboard
projects.desc: HR analytics dashboard tracking employee attrition, satisfaction ratings, and workforce demographics.

projects.title: Sales & Finance Analysis
projects.desc: Comprehensive Excel-based analysis of AtliQ Hardware sales and financial performance across regions.
